seo_title: Beacon Biosignals Maps Brain During Sleep with AI-Driven Platform
meta_description: Beacon Biosignals is using AI to monitor brain activity while people sleep, accelerating diagnostics and treatment of neurological disorders.
body_html:
Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep with an AI-driven platform that uses electroencephalogram (EEG) technology to measure brain activity while people sleep.

Key Features of Beacon's Platform

  • Uses machine-learning algorithms to process EEG data and monitor effects of novel treatments
  • Creates patient cohorts for clinical trials and accelerates diagnostics
  • Brings clinical-grade EEG into the home, removing constraints of sleep labs

Benefits of Beacon's Platform

BenefitDescription
Scalable source of high-quality data for diagnostics and drug developmentData from sleep monitoring can be used to identify new signs of disease progression
Longitudinal brain health trackingEnables researchers to monitor changes in brain activity over time
Accelerated clinical trialsBeacon's platform can help identify potential treatments and accelerate patient enrollment

Partnerships and Clinical Trials

Beacon partners with pharmaceutical companies to accelerate its path to patients.

  • Has been used in over 40 clinical trials across the globe
  • Studies have aimed at treating conditions including major depressive disorder, schizophrenia, narcolepsy, and Parkinson’s disease

source.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
source.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
